title: peucedanum caspicum
intro: Peucedanum caspicum, also known as Cappadocian angelica or Persian angelica, is a plant species in the carrot family (Apiaceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Peucedanum caspicum are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
